name: VidGen AI v4 â€” Ollama Omnichannel

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $input.first().json.body ?? $input.first().json;
const metadata = (payload.metadata && typeof payload.metadata === 'object') ? payload.metadata : {};
const platforms = Array.isArray(metadata.platforms) ? metadata.platforms.map(p => String(p).toLowerCase()) : ['youtube'];
const jobId = payload.jobId;

if (!jobId) throw new Error('[VidGen] jobId wajib ada di payload');
if (!payload.prompt) throw new Error('[VidGen] field prompt wajib ada di payload');

const jobDir = `/tmp/vidgen_${jobId}`;
const publicDir = `/var/www/vidgen-tmp/${jobId}`;
const publicBaseUrl = `https://automation.maksitech.id/vidgen-tmp/${jobId}`;

return [{ json: {
  jobId,
  uid: payload.uid || '',
  title: payload.title || 'Video tanpa judul',
  prompt: payload.prompt,
  source: payload.source || 'dashboard',
  category: payload.category || 'Umum',
  scheduledTime: payload.scheduledTime || '',
  callbackUrl: payload.callbackUrl || '',
  callbackSecret: payload.callbackSecret || '',
  appBaseUrl: payload.appBaseUrl || 'https://automation.maksitech.id',
  ollamaBaseUrl: (metadata.ollamaBaseUrl || payload.ollamaBaseUrl || 'http://127.0.0.1:11434').replace(/\/$/, ''),
  ollamaModel: metadata.ollamaModel || payload.ollamaModel || 'qwen2.5:7b-instruct',
  metadata,
  platforms,
  platformsStr: platforms.join(','),
  ttsVoice: metadata.ttsVoice || 'id-ID-ArdiNeural',
  style: metadata.style || 'cinematic documentary, high detail, dramatic lighting',
  mood: metadata.mood || 'informatif dan menarik',
  clipCount: Math.min(parseInt(metadata.clipCount) || 20, 30),
  clipDuration: parseInt(metadata.clipDuration) || 8,
  youtubeCategory: metadata.youtubeCategory || '27',
  jobDir,
  narasiPath: `${jobDir}/narasi.mp3`,
  narasiTxtPath: `${jobDir}/narasi.txt`,
  clipsDir: `${jobDir}/clips`,
  filelistPath: `${jobDir}/filelist.txt`,
  rawVideoPath: `${jobDir}/raw.mp4`,
  finalVideoPath: `${jobDir}/final.mp4`,
  shortVideoPath: `${jobDir}/short.mp4`,
  thumbPath: `${jobDir}/thumb.jpg`,
  publicDir,
  publicBaseUrl,
  finalVideoUrl: `${publicBaseUrl}/final.mp4`,
  shortVideoUrl: `${publicBaseUrl}/short.mp4`,
  thumbUrl: `${publicBaseUrl}/thumb.jpg`,
  callbackHeaders: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'x-vidgen-callback-secret': payload.callbackSecret || ''
  }
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'n8n mulai memproses job produksi video.', progress: 5, executionId: $execution.id }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.jobDir }}"
NARASI_PATH="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiPath }}"
NARASI_TXT="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiTxtPath }}"
TTS_VOICE="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.ttsVoice }}"
NARASI_B64="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiB64 }}"

echo "[TTS] Menulis narasi ke file..."
echo "$NARASI_B64" | base64 -d > "$NARASI_TXT"

echo "[TTS] Voice: $TTS_VOICE"
echo "[TTS] Output: $NARASI_PATH"

edge-tts --file "$NARASI_TXT" --voice "$TTS_VOICE" --write-media "$NARASI_PATH"

if [ -f "$NARASI_PATH" ]; then
  duration=$(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$NARASI_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "TTS_OK"
  echo "AUDIO_PATH:$NARASI_PATH"
  echo "AUDIO_DURATION:$duration"
else
  echo "[TTS ERROR] File audio tidak ditemukan"
  exit 1
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Narasi audio berhasil dibuat, mulai generate video clips.', progress: 30 }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
CLIPS_DIR="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipsDir }}"
PROMPTS_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.promptsB64 }}"
CLIP_DURATION={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipDuration }}
HF_TOKEN="${HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN:-}"
JOBID="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobId }}"

echo "[CLIPS] Mendekode daftar prompts..."
echo "$PROMPTS_B64" | base64 -d > /tmp/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json

echo "[CLIPS] Mulai generate klip di: $CLIPS_DIR"

python3 /opt/vidgen/generate_clips.py \
  --clips-dir "$CLIPS_DIR" \
  --prompts-file "/tmp/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json" \
  --hf-token "$HF_TOKEN" \
  --clip-duration "$CLIP_DURATION"

CLIP_COUNT=$(ls "$CLIPS_DIR"/clip_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "CLIPS_GENERATED:$CLIP_COUNT"
echo "CLIPS_DIR:$CLIPS_DIR"
echo "CLIPS_OK"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobDir }}"
CLIPS_DIR="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipsDir }}"
FILELIST="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.filelistPath }}"
AUDIO="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.audio_path }}"
RAW="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.rawVideoPath }}"
FINAL="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.finalVideoPath }}"
SHORT="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.shortVideoPath }}"
THUMB="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.thumbPath }}"

# Buat filelist
> "$FILELIST"
for f in $(ls "$CLIPS_DIR"/clip_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  [ -s "$f" ] && echo "file '$f'" >> "$FILELIST"
done

CLIP_COUNT=$(wc -l < "$FILELIST")
if [ "$CLIP_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "[FFMPEG ERROR] Tidak ada klip yang ditemukan di $CLIPS_DIR"
  exit 1
fi
echo "[FFMPEG] $CLIP_COUNT klip ditemukan"

ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "$FILELIST" \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 23 -r 24 \
  -vf scale=480:852 "$RAW" 2>&1

ffmpeg -y -stream_loop -1 -i "$RAW" -i "$AUDIO" \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 \
  -c:a aac -b:a 128k \
  -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 \
  -shortest -movflags +faststart "$FINAL" 2>&1

ffmpeg -y -i "$FINAL" -t 60 \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 \
  -c:a aac -b:a 128k \
  -movflags +faststart "$SHORT" 2>&1

ffmpeg -y -i "$FINAL" -vf 'thumbnail,scale=1280:720' \
  -frames:v 1 "$THUMB" 2>&1

FINAL_SIZE=$(du -sh "$FINAL" | cut -f1)
FINAL_DUR=$(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$FINAL" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

echo "FFMPEG_OK"
echo "FINAL_VIDEO:$FINAL"
echo "FINAL_SIZE:$FINAL_SIZE"
echo "FINAL_DURATION:$FINAL_DUR"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/final.mp4"
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/short.mp4"
if [ -f "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" ]; then
  cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/thumb.jpg"
fi
chmod -R 755 "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}"
echo "PUBLIC_OK"
echo "PUBLIC_FINAL:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoUrl }}"
echo "PUBLIC_SHORT:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoUrl }}"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Video berhasil dirender. Mulai upload ke platform.', progress: 70 }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
PLATFORMS="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.platformsStr }}"
FINAL="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}"
SHORT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}"
THUMB="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}"
JUDUL_YT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.judul }}"
DESKRIPSI="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.deskripsi }}"
JUDUL_TT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.judul_tiktok }}"
CAPTION_FB="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.caption_facebook }}"
YT_CATEGORY="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.youtubeCategory }}"
PUBLIC_FINAL="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoUrl }}"
PUBLIC_SHORT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoUrl }}"
TAGS="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.tags.join(',') }}"

python3 /opt/vidgen/upload_platforms.py \
  --platforms "$PLATFORMS" \
  --final-video "$FINAL" \
  --short-video "$SHORT" \
  --thumb "$THUMB" \
  --title-yt "$JUDUL_YT" \
  --desc-yt "$DESKRIPSI" \
  --title-tiktok "$JUDUL_TT" \
  --caption-fb "$CAPTION_FB" \
  --yt-category "$YT_CATEGORY" \
  --public-short-url "$PUBLIC_SHORT" \
  --tags "$TAGS"

parameters.jsCode:
const err = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { error: err.error?.message || 'Unknown error', executionId: err.execution?.id || '' } }];
